expectedIssues: Casino icon design/layout is broken in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: Game cards in the right column of both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are clipped/cut off at the screen edge. Game titles like 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...', 'HYPERO', and 'DAR WATE' are partially visible and unreadable.
The 'Hot Ga...' navigation tab label is truncated and the full label (likely 'Hot Games') is not visible, reducing discoverability of that section.
The bottom row of 'Top Played New Games' shows partially loaded/cut-off game thumbnails at the very bottom of the viewport with no indication of how many more rows exist.
The 'i' info icons on each game card appear small and low contrast against the dark card backgrounds, potentially making them hard to tap or identify for users with visual impairments.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues specifically describe a broken casino icon design/layout in the bottom nav bar; reported issues focus on game card clipping, tab label truncation, and info icon visibility.
